title: ModularWarfare-Shining-MeleeAddon
description:
Provide a melee weapon system for ModularWarfare-Shining.
Range damage, controllable attack range, bounced by blocks, light and heavy hits, random animation matching, inspection.
body:
[Video](https://youtu.be/O_zwqK7m5k0) Description: Projects developed a few months ago may not be updated thereafter Provide a melee weapon system for ModularWarfare-Shining. Range damage, controllable attack range, bounced by blocks, light and heavy hits, random animation matching, inspection. Here is an attack range indicator that is only available when "dev_mode" is true. You can download "[Shining]siz-melee-contentpack" in the download page. In this addon you can: 1. Using multiple different light and heavy attack animations. 2. Can attacks be reset at any time. 3. Can the post attack be skip. 4. Can attacks penetrate entities. 5. Customizable attack range.

Installation: *Put the jar into "addons_mwf_shining" folder. *Put the content pack into "ModularWarfare" folder
